products.name: PET Preform Mold
products.description: High-cavitation PET preform injection molds engineered for maximum output and dimensional consistency. Available in 2 to 160 multi-cavity mold configurations with support for standard neck finishes including 1716, PCO1810, PCO1881, 3025, 2925, 2622, 2522, 38mm, 45mm, 68mm, 80mm, 90mm wide mouth Jars…etc. Designed for seamless integration with HUSKY, NETSTAL, SACMI, SIPA, Milacron and other injection molding machine platforms. Ideal for mineral water bottle, CSD, and beverage packaging preform production.
bullets: Standards: Full support for PCO 1881, 1810, 2925, 2622, 2522, 38mm, 45mm, 68mm, 80mm, ROPP…etc and custom neck finishes.
Annual Capacity: Over 12,000 cavities produced yearly.
Design: Optimized for minimized cycle times and maximum resin distribution consistency.

products.name: Preform mold
products.description: High-cavitation PET preform injection molds engineered for maximum output and dimensional consistency. Available in 32 to 160 multi-cavity mold configurations with support for standard neck finishes including PCO 1716, PCO 1810, 3025, PCO 1881, 2925, 2622, and 38mm. Designed for seamless integration with HUSKY, NETSTAL, SIPA, and KATA injection molding machine platforms. Ideal for mineral water bottle, CSD, and beverage packaging preform production.

products.name: Preform mold
products.description: High-cavitation PET preform injection molds engineered for maximum output and dimensional consistency. Available in 32 to 160 multi-cavity mold configurations with support for standard neck finishes including PCO 1716, PCO 1810, 3025, PCO 1881, 2925, 2622, and 38mm. Designed for seamless integration with HUSKY, NETSTAL, SIPA, and KATA injection molding machine platforms. Ideal for mineral water bottle, CSD, and beverage packaging preform production.

products.name: Compression mold
products.description: Precision compression molds for high-speed closure production. Engineered for SACMI compression molding machines and compatible injection molding platforms, delivering consistent food-grade PET closure quality at production speeds. Supports beverage, edible oil, and cosmetic packaging applications.

products.name: Compression mold
products.description: Precision compression molds for high-speed closure production. Engineered for SACMI compression molding machines and compatible injection molding platforms, delivering consistent food-grade PET closure quality at production speeds. Supports beverage, edible oil, and cosmetic packaging applications.

products.name: Closure mold
products.description: Injection and compression closure molds for one-piece and two-piece cap designs, including EU tethered cap compatible configurations. Available in 12 to 72 multi-cavity configurations supporting 26mm, 28mm, 2925, 3025, and 38mm neck finish specifications. Suitable for beverage packaging, edible oil, condiment, cosmetic packaging, pharmaceutical, and food-grade PET applications. Compatible with major closure injection molding machines and SACMI compression systems.

products.name: Closure mold
products.description: Injection and compression closure molds for one-piece and two-piece cap designs, including EU tethered cap compatible configurations. Available in 12 to 72 multi-cavity configurations supporting 26mm, 28mm, 2925, 3025, and 38mm neck finish specifications. Suitable for beverage packaging, edible oil, condiment, cosmetic packaging, pharmaceutical, and food-grade PET applications. Compatible with major closure injection molding machines and SACMI compression systems.

products.name: Blow mold
products.description: PET blow molds for two-step and one-step blow molding processes. Engineered for leading equipment platforms including SIDEL, KRONES, KHS, TECH-LONG, NEWAMSTAR (two-step) and SIPA, ASB, AOKI (one-step). Serving the beverage packaging industry with mineral water bottle, CSD packaging, hot-fill, and aseptic bottle solutions, as well as food-grade PET, edible oil, cosmetic packaging, toiletry, and pharmaceutical containers. Supports lightweighting and wall thickness optimization designs.

products.name: Hot Runner System
products.description: High-performance valve gate hot runner systems supporting up to 144 cavities for PET preform injection and 96 cavities for closure injection. Engineered with nozzle tip, valve pin, and manifold backing plate components for uniform melt distribution, precise temperature control, and minimal pressure drop. Compatible with HUSKY, NETSTAL, KM, SIPA, and other major preform and closure injection molding machine platforms.

products.name: Hot Runner System
products.description: High-performance valve gate hot runner systems supporting up to 144 cavities for PET preform injection and 96 cavities for closure injection. products.name: Accessories Kit
products.description: Precision-machined accessories and conversion parts for PET blow molding equipment. Including blowing pins, mold shells, clamping bases, guide pin and bushing sets, and custom adapters for neck finish modifications, capacity changes, and cross-platform mold conversions. Engineered to OEM specifications for seamless equipment integration with SIDEL, KRONES, and KHS platforms.

products.name: Precision Mold Base
products.description: Ultra-precision mold base manufacturing utilizing advanced CNC machining centers, precision grinding, and rigorous quality control. Every mold base is engineered for exceptional flatness, parallelism, and dimensional accuracy — forming the foundation for reliable, high-performance PET preform mold and blow mold assemblies. Supports multi-cavity mold configurations for high-cavitation production.

products.name: QC equipment
products.description: State-of-the-art quality control and metrology equipment including Zeiss coordinate measuring machines, 3D profile scanners, optical comparators, and dedicated bottle sample inspection systems. Ensuring every PET preform mold core cavity and neck ring component meets exacting dimensional specifications for high-cavitation production.

products.description: World-class CNC machining centers and precision manufacturing equipment from Mazak, Makino, Okamoto (Japan), Haas, Hardinge (USA), and Beijing Jingdiao. Delivering micron-level accuracy across all PET preform mold core, cavity, gate insert, and neck ring components.
